== Notes for [[Item:Q105332|Q105332]] ==

32. ANTONIO4 GUERRA-CANAMAR-MORALES (LEONOR3 DE MORALES, JUANA2 DE TREVINO-QUINTANILLA-Y-SALAZAR, PEDRO1 DE SALAZAR)
*He married MARIA GONZALEZ in Mexico City, D.F., Mexico.

Child of ANTONIO GUERRA-CANAMAR-MORALES and MARIA GONZALEZ is:
*1. i. JUAN5 GUERRA-CANAMAR-GONZALEZ.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000014429920486

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
